title: Costa's Method for Quadratic Form Minimization
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of using Costa's method to minimize a quadratic form subject to linear constraints.
relationships: Start with defining the objective function and constraints
Construct the Lagrangian by combining them with Lagrange multipliers
Find critical points by setting the gradient of the Lagrangian to zero
Solve the symmetric linear system to find the optimal variable values and multipliers
